name: roundtrip_comprehensive_scalars
description: Round-trip test: every scalar type and quoting edge case in one object
expected:
GCF profile=generic
bare_string=hello world
quoted_true="true"
quoted_false="false"
quoted_null="-"
quoted_number="42"
quoted_empty=""
quoted_tilde="~"
quoted_caret="^"
actual_true=true
actual_false=false
actual_null=-
actual_int=42
actual_decimal=3.14
actual_exponent=6.022e+23
actual_zero=0
with_pipe="a|b"
with_newline="line1\nline2"
with_quote="say \"hi\""
with_backslash="path\\to"
leading_space=" x"
trailing_space="x "
at_sign="@user"
hash_sign="# tag"
plus_num="+1"
dot_num=".5"
leading_zero="01"
